name: The Silk Blouse
alt: Ivory silk blouse styled in a quiet atelier
description: A fluid ivory blouse cut for quiet confidence and everyday polish.
longDescription: A softened silk-blend blouse with a relaxed collar, fluid sleeve, and an easy drape that tucks cleanly beneath tailoring.
fit: Relaxed through the body with a gently curved hem
atelierNote: Pressed by hand for a soft collar roll and a polished cuff line.
finish: Shell-toned buttons, clean French seams, fluid sleeve volume

name: The Tailored Blazer
alt: Black tailored blazer with softened waist
description: Sculptural black tailoring with a softened waist and precise shoulder line.
longDescription: A structured single-breasted blazer shaped with a precise shoulder, subtle waist definition, and a satin-lined interior.
fit: Sharp shoulder, true waist, longline cut
atelierNote: Balanced through the shoulder and waist so the silhouette holds without feeling severe.
finish: Satin-lined interior, softened lapel, invisible internal stay

name: The Satin Slip Dress
alt: Black satin slip dress on a dress form
description: Liquid satin with a bias line, made for restrained evening elegance.
longDescription: A bias-cut satin dress with a fluid neckline, concealed side zip, and a line that moves softly without losing shape.
fit: Bias cut, softly skims the body
atelierNote: Cut on the bias for movement, then weighted through the hem for a quieter drape.
finish: Concealed side zip, fine straps, fully lined interior

name: The Longline Coat
alt: Camel longline coat styled with quiet knitwear
description: A camel-taupe wool coat with a long, enveloping silhouette.
longDescription: An enveloping wrap coat designed with a softened lapel, clean belt, and generous line over knitwear or evening pieces.
atelierNote: Shaped with enough ease to sit over tailoring while keeping a long, composed line.
finish: Cupro lining, clean belt channel, hand-finished lapel edge

name: The Evening Knit Set
alt: Soft ivory knit set styled with outerwear
description: Soft ivory knit separates for composed evenings and slow mornings.
longDescription: A tonal knit top and skirt pairing with refined rib texture, clean waist shaping, and an easy evening-to-morning rhythm.
care: Cold hand wash or specialist clean
fit: Close but soft, with stretch recovery
atelierNote: Knitted for a smooth handfeel with enough structure to hold its shape after wear.
finish: Fine rib texture, tonal waistband, linked seams
